mechanism_narrative: Rising CPIAUCSL increases inflation expectations, prompting market repricing of equity valuations downward as real discount rates rise, generating negative forward S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 or forward returns are positive in >55% of months when CPIAUCSL increases.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE exceeds 6.0%, labor market slack reduces corporate wage pressures and signals economic deceleration, triggering a flight to quality that depresses equity prices over the next week.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns are positive in >60% of observations where UNRATE crosses above 6.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in RSAFS and HOUST indicates robust consumer spending and housing market strength, which directly boosts corporate revenue forecasts and drives positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to produce positive 60-day returns in >50% of cases, or interaction term loses statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Declining INDPRO during a monetary tightening cycle signals supply-side contraction that outweighs demand resilience, causing earnings downgrades and negative monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during tightening periods yield positive 20-day returns in >55% of instances, negating the supply-contraction channel.

mechanism_narrative: Increases in PAYEMS reflect expanding employment and rising household income, which sustains consumer demand and supports corporate earnings, producing positive forward S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth correlates negatively with 20-day forward returns or Rank IC falls below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS falls below 0.50%, extreme monetary accommodation compresses risk premiums and fuels liquidity-driven equity rallies, generating positive short-term market returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >65% of months where FEDFUNDS remains below 0.50%.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising GDPC1 and falling RSAFS indicates savings-driven growth rather than consumption, which reduces immediate corporate revenue visibility and suppresses quarterly equity valuations.
failure_condition: The GDPC1-RSAFS divergence fails to predict negative 60-day returns, or the interaction coefficient is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO alongside stable CPIAUCSL during a low-rate environment signals healthy productive capacity without inflationary pressure, supporting equity multiples and positive monthly returns.
failure_condition: 20-day returns are negative in >60% of periods meeting the trigger, or INDPRO loses predictive power when inflation is low.
